---
title: "Structure and API Info"
format: html
---

## folder tree structure

schertz_council_docs_r2_app/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .gitignore
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .Rproj
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app.R
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ refresh_and_deploy_local.R
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ manifest.json
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .github/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ workflows/
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ weekly-refresh.yml
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ R/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 00_config.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ discover_city_hub.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ discover_destinyhosted.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ discover_laserfiche.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ normalize_documents.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ download_documents.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ extract_text.R
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ build_search_data.R
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ run_pipeline.R
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ scripts/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ update_data.R
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ launchd_runner.sh
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ derived/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ documents.rds
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ refresh_metadata.csv
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ refresh_comparison_summary.csv
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ refresh_comparison_details.csv
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ logs/
в””в”Ђв”Ђ tmp/


## Do not create these inside the project:


- data/raw/
- giant packet PDFs
- long-term downloaded archives
- big intermediate CSVs unless truly needed

Those now belong in R2, not in the project folder.


## Bring these over from your current Phase 2 project

- deploy_app/app.R в†’ rename/move to new root app.R
- deploy_app/R/00_config.R в†’ R/00_config.R
- the pipeline helper files in deploy_app/R/
- discover_city_hub.R
- discover_destinyhosted.R
- discover_laserfiche.R
- normalize_documents.R
- download_documents.R
- extract_text.R
- build_search_data.R
- run_pipeline.R
- your current working scripts/update_data.R
- your current local combined script logic from refresh_and_deploy_local.R
- your small derived outputs if you want an initial working seed:
- documents.rds
- refresh_metadata.csv
- refresh_comparison_summary.csv
- refresh_comparison_details.csv


## Do not bring over


- deploy_app/data/raw/
- deploy_app/data/derived/*.csv big intermediates
- documents_with_text.csv
- documents_downloaded.csv
- documents_normalized.csv
- packet PDFs
- old GitHub Actions deploy logic
- laserfiche_archive_seed.rds unless we decide it is still needed after redesign



## How this differs from the old project

The new project will:


- run from the root
- have app.R at root, like the model project
- keep only small finished files locally in data/derived
- use R2 for raw packet storage
- use launchd for scheduling


***avoid deploy_app/ entirely***


That is the clean break you wanted.


## What app files should be deployed to shinyapps.io

Only these kinds of files:


app.R
R/00_config.R
any other small helper R files truly needed by the app
data/derived/documents.rds
data/derived/refresh_metadata.csv

***Possibly the comparison files too, but only if you want them visible/available.***


## What stays local

- project code
- launchd plist and runner script
- logs
- any temporary files
- local working credentials/config
- optional small cache files


## What lives in R2

- raw agenda PDFs
- raw packet PDFs
- optionally extracted text cache for large docs
- optionally a compact вЂњalready seen/downloadedвЂќ index if we decide to store it there too


## Why this is closer to the model example

Like the model:

- scheduled refresh outside the app
- app at root
- thin app
- separate processing logic
- small derived outputs


## Different from the model only where necessary:

- your raw files are too large, so they go to R2 instead of a local data/ folder inside the repo


## What IвЂ™d do first

- Create the new RStudio project named:  schertz_council_docs_r2_app
- Then create only this minimal starter structure:
    schertz_council_docs_r2_app/в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app.Rв”њв”Ђв”Ђ refresh_and_deploy_local.Rв”њв”Ђв”Ђ R/в”њв”Ђв”Ђ        scripts/в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ derived/в”њв”Ђв”Ђ logs/в””в”Ђв”Ђ tmp/
    



### App file

DONE - deploy_app/app.R в†’ becomes new root app.R 

### R helper files

DONE - deploy_app/R/00_config.R
DONE - deploy_app/R/discover_city_hub.R
DONE - deploy_app/R/discover_destinyhosted.R
DONE - deploy_app/R/discover_laserfiche.R
DONE - deploy_app/R/normalize_documents.R
DONE - deploy_app/R/download_documents.R
DONE - deploy_app/R/extract_text.R
DONE - deploy_app/R/build_search_data.R
DONE - deploy_app/R/run_pipeline.R

### Scripts

DONE - scripts/update_data.R
DONE - your working local refresh/deploy script logic, which will become the new root refresh_and_deploy_local.R

### Small derived seed files

DONE - deploy_app/data/derived/documents.rds
DONE - deploy_app/data/derived/refresh_metadata.csv
DONE - deploy_app/data/derived/refresh_comparison_summary.csv
DONE - deploy_app/data/derived/refresh_comparison_details.csv
